variants: As a professional in cognitive neuroscience, Baris Arslan has made noteworthy strides in research. His projects enjoy funding from the Cypress Field Grant, allowing him to explore innovative ideas. Additionally, Baris is an active member of the Mistridge Topiary Society, where he engages with his passion for topiary and gardening.
